daily.today_energy: Your vibe is giving introspective visionary energy. It's a perfect day to journal those wild ideas bouncing around in your head and let intuition guide you toward what actually matters.
daily.love: Someone's been noticing your quiet confidence lately. Whether you're single or coupled up, genuine connection is calling—skip the games and just be real with the people who matter.
daily.career: Your unique perspective is your superpower rn. Don't dim your light to fit in; the projects that need your weird genius are waiting. Trust your unconventional approach.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement that feels good, not punishment. Dance, walk, stretch—whatever makes you feel alive. Your nervous system will thank you for honoring what it actually needs.

weekly.overview: This week invites you to embrace your authentic weirdness, Aquarius. Mercury's vibes are pushing you to speak your truth without apology. Expect unexpected connections and conversations that hit different. Trust your gut instincts.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled up or solo, this is your moment to set real boundaries. If you're dating, someone's about to see the real you—and honestly? They're going to vibe with it. Keep it genuine, keep it you.
weekly.career: Your creative wavelength is seriously elevated right now. That idea you've been sitting on? Stop overthinking and pitch it. Your perspective is exactly what your space needs. Leadership moment incoming if you step up.
weekly.health: Your body's asking you to move differently this week. Skip the routine and try something that actually feels fun—dance, hike, whatever calls to you. Mental clarity follows when you break the pattern. Listen to yourself.
